name: Huntington memorial park
description: Huntington memorial park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Huntington, IN. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Parkview Huntington Family YMCA
description: Parkview Huntington Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Huntington, IN. There are 5 wood courts. 4 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons.
